arts.ttl: Liverpool predicted lineup vs PSG - Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool's predicted lineup for the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 against PSG.

arts.ttl: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot defends Ligue 1 on the eve of Champions League clash against PSG
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has lifted the lid on his opinion on Ligue 1 on the eve of the Champions League RO16 first leg against PSG. The Premier League…

arts.ttl: Arne Slot speaks out Khvicha Kvaratskhelia transfer after Liverpool interest
arts.sum: Arne Slot has been quizzed about Liverpool's reported interest in Khvicha Kvaratskhelia prior to his move to Paris Saint-Germain

arts.ttl: Slot: Liverpool must win UCL to be Europe's best
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has said his team need to win the Champions League to be considered the best in Europe and insists they must be prepared to "suffer" against Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: Liverpool confirm FSG stake sale that values club at £4.2bn
Arne Slot makes promise as Liverpool boss responds to FA claims and Michael Oliver
arts.sum: Liverpool face Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League on Wednesday night but, at Tuesday night's pre-match press conference, Arne Slot didn't shy away from questions over his alleged X-rated rant at referee Michael Oliver at the end of the Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Liverpool break vital £100m barrier as plan for future comes into focus
arts.sum: Fenway Sports Group have invested in growing Anfield since they arrived at the club in 2010

arts.ttl: Newcastle United chief opens up on future of Liverpool target Alexander Isak
arts.sum: Newcastle plan to revisit contract talks with Alexander Isak at the end of the season but have made it clear to their star striker that he’s already tied down to a long-term deal. The Daily Mail reveals that discussions took place towards the end of last season but never gained traction. arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends classy Michael Oliver message after Premier League snub and Liverpool charge
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has reacted to the FA releasing the written reasons for his two-game ban after being sent off at Everton last month

arts.ttl: ‘A great fixture to look forward to for anyone who loves football’ – Arne Slot previews PSG-Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot can’t wait for the Reds to go head-to-head with PSG on Wednesday for the Champions League RO16 first leg to be held at Paris’ Parc…
